message:
fix: update Anthropic and Gemini context window sizes to 1M tokens (GAP-3.02, GAP-3.08)

Both providers now support 1M token context windows. The old values
(200K for Anthropic, 128K for Gemini) were outdated.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -249,7 +249,7 @@ func NewAnthropicProfile(model string) ProviderProfile {
 		id:              "anthropic",
 		model:           strings.TrimSpace(model),
 		parallel:        true,
-		contextWindow:   200_000,
+		contextWindow:   1_000_000,
 		basePrompt:      embeddedBasePrompt("anthropic"),
 		docFiles:        []string{"CLAUDE.md", "AGENTS.md"},
 		reasoning:       true,
@@ -285,7 +285,7 @@ func NewGeminiProfile(model string) ProviderProfile {
 		id:              "gemini",
 		model:           strings.TrimSpace(model),
 		parallel:        true,
-		contextWindow:   128_000,
+		contextWindow:   1_000_000,
 		basePrompt:      embeddedBasePrompt("gemini"),
 		docFiles:        []string{"GEMINI.md", "AGENTS.md"},
 		reasoning:       true,
